headline: McKesson Closes Strategic Investment with Apollo Funds for Minority Interest in Medical-Surgical Solutions
summary: IRVING, Texas, June 02, 2026--McKesson Corporation (NYSE: MCK) announced today the successful completion of the previously announced minority ownership interest investment from funds managed by affiliates of Apollo ("Apollo Funds") in McKesson’s Medical-Surgical Solutions ("MMS") business on June 1, 2026. This transaction represents a key milestone in McKesson’s intention to separate MMS into an independent, publicly traded company, and positions the business for long-term growth.
